hero.title: Getting to Pilani
hero.subtitle: Your comprehensive guide to reaching the BITS Pilani campus.

intro: Pilani is located in rural Rajasthan and is somewhat isolated from major cities, making the journey quite an adventure. It is not directly connected by air or train, so reaching the campus usually involves a combination of transportation modes.

routes.title: From Delhi
routes.details: The bus journey is approximately 5-6 hours long. Buses are available from ISBT Kashmere Gate and Dhaula Kuan. Alternatively, you can take a train to Loharu Junction and hire a cab to the campus.

routes.title: From Jaipur
routes.details: The journey from Jaipur is around 4-5 hours by bus. Buses from the Sindhi Camp Bus Stand provide direct services to Pilani.

tips.title: Book in Advance
tips.desc: Always book train or bus tickets well in advance, especially during event seasons.

tips.title: Carry Essentials
tips.desc: Pilani is a small town, so carry essential items with you as options for shopping are limited.

tips.title: Prepare for Weather
tips.desc: Summers can be harsh, so carry sunscreen, caps, and light clothing.

disclaimer: Please note kindly that BITS Pilani and Accord would not be liable to make travel arrangements for participants. All delegates are requested to arrange their trip by themselves to the venue. However, we can offer online assistance as needed.
